contentBlocks.title: Compliance Requirements
items: The HVAC system must comply with all relevant energy efficiency requirements specified in Section J of the NCC.
System must meet minimum energy efficiency standards
All components must be properly sized and installed
Documentation must be maintained to demonstrate compliance

contentBlocks.title: Verification and Testing
items: The installed HVAC system must be verified and tested to ensure it meets the specified energy efficiency requirements.
System performance must be tested and documented
Energy consumption must be monitored and recorded
Any non-compliant issues must be rectified

contentBlocks.title: Documentation
items: Comprehensive documentation must be maintained to demonstrate compliance with energy efficiency requirements.
